hero.title: Smart Equipment Management
hero.subtitle: Track, manage, and optimize your institution's equipment with ease.
hero.subtitle2: The modern way to track, manage, and share equipment across your campus. Built by students, for students.

features.title: Everything you need to manage equipment
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to make equipment tracking effortless for everyone on campus.
features.iotTrackingDesc: Real-time monitoring and automated alerts when devices are removed beyond authorized premises.
features.qrScanningDesc: Secure Borrow/Return with QR codes, photo documentation, and chain of custody records.
features.riskAnalyticsDesc: Data-driven insights, automated reporting, and preventive controls to reduce theft opportunities.

howItWorks.title: Simple as
howItWorks.subtitle: From browsing to returning, the entire process takes just minutes.

users.title: Who uses
users.subtitle: From students to administrators, everyone benefits from streamlined equipment management.
users.studentsDesc: Browse, request, and track equipment with ease
users.lecturersDesc: Reserve gear for classes and research projects
users.securityDesc: Monitor alerts, track missing devices, and ensure campus security
users.gatekeepersDesc: Verify equipment, scan QR codes at checkout, and manage access
users.adminsDesc: Monitor usage trends and generate reports

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message!
